head.hi: The Ambassador in the Soviet Union (Kennan) to the Department of State

div.p:
27. Appreciate receiving inf contained Deptel 936, June 30In this telegram, the Department of State informed Kennan of the Zinchenko–Gross conversation and stated that it did not intend to pursue this channel for fear of “crossing wires” with the Indian-Chinese connection (795.00/6–3052). Regarding this conversation, see telegram 986, p. 364. concerning Zinchenko talks. I am inclined, however, to question whether we wld not be better advised to keep both channels, i.e. Indian-Chi channel and Zinchenko channel, open and active at this stage. This wld give us opportunity to detect any differences of approach between Russ and Chi and a cross-check on any errors of understanding or memory that
may slip into the somewhat involved and indirect channel to Chi Commies.
